title: taraxacum savonicum
intro: Taraxacum savonicum, also known as the Siberian dandelion or Sibirian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum savonicum include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically in the form of tea or tincture, often used to treat various health conditions, including kidney stones and urinary tract infections.
